|author=[[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], [[Daniel Wallace]]

|website=

|release date=[[March 25]], [[2004]]<ref name="Article">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040325web|text=Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin}}</ref>

'''Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin''' is a Galactic Gazetteer web supplement on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s website. It was written by [[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], and [[Daniel Wallace]] and published online [[March 25]], [[2004]].

This supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' details the [[Yarith sector/Legends|Yarith]], [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat]], and [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sectors]].

{{Game-stub}}
